feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sales order credit check issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have maintained a credit limit for a customer as 4lac

while uploading the multiple sales order at once (Mass order creation) the system is not checking the credit limit

any suggestions how to solve this

entry.title: SD self-billing - SAFT
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are working on the SD self-billing process for our project. This is a Portuguese company, and the end customer sends the self-billing document. Our company needs to create the billing document using the SD module to "replicate" the document created by the end customer and handle all subsequent processes.

We want to ensure compliance with Portuguese legal requirements. According to our customer, this SD self-billing document should not have a digital signature and should not be included in the SAFT file.

We have a specific SD document type and a specific number range for this type of document. However, according to SAP Note 2642802, “Since the publication of Despacho 8632/2014, all documents generated in SD (invoices, credit notes, debit notes, pro-formas, deliveries, etc.) must be digitally signed.” This means we cannot create an SD invoice without a digital signature.

We have tried to find information on how to exclude the digital signature in SAP documentation (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9b351d6e33a0496598e4b58782565e8a/9ce5465761a14af4908511c0348360b3.html) or in the SAFT for Portugal user guide PDF from SAP (https://help.sap.com/doc/a3fc11aded07460d99f1f938e1c29496/6.18.latest/en-US/User%20Guide%20for%20SAF-T%20Portugal%20v1.15.pdf), but we could not find this scenario in the documentation. In these two links, we found information about self-billing in the MM (Materials Management) scenario, but not in the SD (Sales and Distribution) scenario like ours.

We have a few questions:

  1. How can we create an SD billing document without a digital signature in this particular scenario?
  2. How should we customize our billing type to indicate that this is a self-billing document?
  3. How can we exclude this document from the SAFT file? According to Chapter 4.2 of the SAFT for Portugal user guide, we did not find this scenario covered.

Thank you for your help.

#SD #SAFT #Portugal #selfbilling #DigitalSignature #SIPT

Ana Machado

entry.title: Condition contract management in S/4 HANA- Settlement document split
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I have a question regarding Condition Contract Management in S/4 HANA. Our client has a requirement to split the settlement document generated for customers, as follows:

Since goods supplied under a condition contract may have various ‘Tax Dept / Tax Dest’ combinations, they would like this to be reflected in the settlement document created during the payout process. The options they are considering are:

- A separate settlement document for each ‘Tax Dept / Tax Dest’ combination, or
- Separate line items within the settlement document for each ‘Tax Dept / Tax Dest’ combination.

Is there any functionality in S/4 HANA that allows for splitting the settlement document by tax code, resulting in one settlement document per tax code?

Looking forward to your guidance.

Thank you!

entry.title: Changing the credit horizon from months to days in P23 system
entry.content:
Hello Team,

In our system we got a request to change the credit horizon from months to days. We would like to know if it is possible to change the credit horizon and what are the implications by changing this horizon and what would action items to be taken if we change credit horizon from months to days.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Document is always empty in Fiori App F4111. Is it possible to display values here?
entry.content:
We have activated the app F4111 Manage Prices Sales in our environment and noticed that the Sales Document and Payment Terms columns are always shown blank. 

Is it possible to show values for these fields?

There was a KBA that has now been removed (3156108) that fields without Global Field Names are not supported. Is there an update or a solution available now?

entry.title: Can we use Scheduling Agreement with Delivery Order in combination with consignment?
entry.content: We are using Scheduling agreement with Delivery order (order types LZM / TAM) in ECC. Customer sends the forecast monthly via EDI and then sends call off to create the Delivery order. Now we are moving to S/4 HANA with 2020 version and I have an additional requirement to combine this process with consignment, meaning instead of creating a delivery order to ship to the customer, we want to create a delivery order to fill up the consignment stock. Does anyone know if this is feasible? Thank you for your comments and time!

entry.title: Periodic Billing with price change.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have created a Periodic billing plan and am using it. I am generating the billing plan at the item level and using this contract to create invoice, directly.

Now, there is a requirement to have an option to increase the price of each line item, inside the periodic billing plan. Example, inside the periodic billing plan, each line item should increase by 5% compounded, compounded. Is there a way to make the price of each line item inside the Periodic Billig editable or make it incremental?

Please tell  will this be done

entry.title: "Order was saved" message appears twice for each order in V_V2
entry.content:
Hello all,

This is my first time asking a question on the community, please pardon any mistakes.

When I execute V_V2 (SDV03V02) in background, for all the orders that are processed and saved, the "order was saved" appears twice. Refer below screenshot.

I am not able to figure out why this is happening (if this is a standard behavior or a result of any customization) and if this adds to the overall processing time for the whole program?
Any inputs on this would really be helpful.

 

TIA

entry.title: Link sales orders to contracts in bulk for Data Migration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have query regarding data migration. Actually, during Sales order migration, we are not able to link the sales order contract number in the sales order. There is no field for the contract in the template of the sale order. We have uploaded the Sales order via migration cockpit. In order to, link the Contract number in the Sales Order we have planned to use LSMW but unfortunately it is not working properly. 

It will be very hard to do this activity manually from VA02 since the volume is high. 

So, can we add the sales contract of a sales order in bulk?

Thank you.

entry.title: Risk category update on released documents
entry.content:
Hello,
After changing the risk category in credit master we are running the RVKRED09 but risk category is not getting updated to the delivery when credit status is "D". we need a solution so when risk category is changed still system can update the new risk category to the released deliveries and stop the further processing


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Intercompany credit memo
entry.content:
Hi, what would be the copy control VTFA settings for intercompany credit memo (CR to IG). 

Trying to create the intercompany billing doc with reference to credit memo request.

Is there any standard formula routine in copy control for this process?

entry.title: Missing connection of material XX in plant YY to the material ledger
entry.content:
Missing connection of material 10000000000000311 in plant CNLB to the material ledger

Hi,

While adding stock in material (MIGO) I am getting this error.

Thank you.

entry.title: PAL change documents functionality in 1909 version
entry.content:
As per the note 2691783 - FAQ: Product Allocation Check (PAL) with aATP the PAL change documents functionality will be provided with OP2023. Seems like due to the high technically complexity the functionality cannot be down ported to lower product versions.

As we are using S/4 HANA 1909 version, please do let  us know, if there are any other alternative approaches in retrieving the change logs.

entry.title: Material Substitution in SAP Sales Cloud v1
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently, we have an existing material substitution process in S4. As an example below for material 1000

It has 2 alternative materials. When creating an order via S4, a new line item is generated:

Now when I try the same order customer & materials via C4C, I get an error:

We are using standard webservices for our order pricing simulation here between C4C and S4.

Thanks for your help in advance.

Cheers,

Marc

entry.title: Incremental price based on miles
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement where i should do a incremental price condition type with miles in Public Cloud. Our client have a product called mobilization. The requirement is to have a price from 0-50 & 51-100 & 101-200 in miles.

i tried to create a condition type with scales with fixed value. say 0-50 for 1000 usd, 51-100 for 2000 usd, 101-200 for 3000 usd. But the scale is not accepting the given values. and to have +5% for few customers.

Please suggest How can i do this in public cloud.

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: VF31: how to excluce cancelled billing documents
entry.content:
hi,

in VF31 the billing documents that were cancelled via VF11 are still showing up. How can they be excluded?

The cancelation document is not showing up, but the original is. How can we avoid this?

kr

Nico

entry.title: SAP Goods consumption document posting date should be same as POD confirmation
entry.content:
Hi friends,

We are implementing the POD process and have identified an issue during the process.

POD Date does not match voucher posting date

Could you tell me what caused this?

Is there a good solution?

Await your kind feedback

Thanks

entry.title: How to Retrigger Output Parameter Determination Automatically Based on Field Update in Sales Order
entry.content:
We are using Output Parameter Determination (OPD) to send an order confirmation when a specific field is populated in the Sales Order. However, this field is typically updated some time after the initial document creation. Currently, it seems that OPD only executes at the time of Sales Order creation. At that point, the field is not yet populated, so the output is either not triggered, or it fails to meet the output relevance criteria. But when the field is updated, OPD does not re-evaluate, and the output is never triggered or sent. However, When we configure the output without the specific field condition (or any other field), it is triggered successfully. So the retriggering must be the problem.

Is there a way to automatically retrigger OPD based on the field update? Is there potentially another solution to ensure output only triggers when this specific field is populated? We have thoroughly tested different options regarding the determination steps for output type and output relevance, but without success. 

Kind regards, Tim

entry.title: Customer credit control issue
entry.content:
Hello,

We are on S4HANA, We have an issue with customer credit control since last SPS update.

Control and blocking is not done when creating new sales order for customer who credit exposure is not yet exceeding credit limit (case1)
but if customer credit exposure already exceed credit limit, all new sales orders will be blocked correctly (case2)

It seems that during creation of sales order the credit check done without consider the new credit Exposure of customer, including the amount of sales order created.

We have the same problem for a second company on the same system who have control when creating deliveries.

Could you please give us some analysis to identify the origin of the problem.

Thanks.

entry.title: SD: Trigger billing after GI posting
entry.content:
Hello gurus,

 

we would like to automatically trigger creation of a bill when GI is posted for the delivery.

 

I.e. user creates sales order, creates delivery and posts the GI for the delivery. Now the bill for that delivery is to be created automatically.

 

It seems, SAP CRM does have a feature for this, but is it possible in ECC as well?

 

Thanks
Jens
